title: Manitoba's Strongest
excerpt:
Preamble
The heaviest showdown in Manitoba returns JULY 11 at Iron Image.
 Big lifts. Brutal events. Cash prizes.
content:
Preamble
The heaviest showdown in Manitoba returns JULY 11 at Iron Image.
 Big lifts. Brutal events. Cash prizes.

If you’re feeling weak, you should probably stay home.

Whether you’re chasing the biggest title in Manitoba, testing yourself against the best in the province, or just coming to make a statement, THIS IS IT.


  CASH PRIZES - Iron Image Barbell Club - Saturday, July 11 - Registration closes MAY 21 at MIDNIGHT


Sign up now through the link in our bio or at ironimage.ca

For questions or sponsorship opportunities, contact @tompachal tom@ironimage.ca

Location
Iron Image, Selkirk

Events
Events

  The Big Bench
max reps, no time limit
Women: 155 lb
Men: 305 lb
  Frame to Yoke
50 ft / 50 ft, 75 s time limit
Women: 365 & 455 lb
Men: 635 & 725 lb
  Monster Bar Deadlift
max reps, 60 s time limit
Women: 375 lb
Men: 605 lb
  Arm Over Arm Pull
50 ft, 75 s time limit
Women: truck & trailer
Men: truck, trailer, & tractor
  Chuck Walk

title: Prairie's Strongest
excerpt:
Preamble
Strongman returns to Vita, with PRAIRIES STRONGEST (an SCC sanctioned event)!
content:
Preamble
Strongman returns to Vita, with PRAIRIES STRONGEST (an SCC sanctioned event)!

This competition will be refereed by none other than the 3x World Champion, “The Dominator” Inez Carrasquillo!

We’re going old school with this event, over/under 105 kg for the men, and over/under 73 kg for the women (points will be separated afterwards for SCC qualifications)! Masters competitors will be lifting the lightweight weights.

This event is open to Manitobans and non-Manitobans alike, so get registered to compete and meet The Dominator!

Location
Shevchenko School, Vita

Events

  Max Zercher Squat - from the ground
  Yoke 50’ / Log for reps medley
Women u73kg: 405 yoke / 115 log
Women 73kg+: 455 yoke / 130 log
Men u105kg: 600 yoke / 215 log
Men 105kg+: 700 yoke / 255 log
  Throwing Sandbag Run (5 bags)
Women u73kg: 15–25
Women 73kg+: 15–30
Men u105kg: 25–45
Men 105kg+: 30–50
  Death Medley — carry, carry, drag
  Ascending-weight Farmers Carry (30’)
Women u73kg: start @ 120, 20 lb jumps
Women 73kg+: start @ 170, 20 lb jumps
Men u105kg: start @ 210, 50 lb jumps
Men 105kg+: start @ 250, 50 lb jumps

title: Strongest Masters
excerpt:
Preamble
Stratton Agri, Rumble in the Valley & StrongManitoba present: WESTERN CANADA’S STRONGEST MASTER 2026!
Held at the Morris Stampede Grounds in Morris, MB (40 mins south of Winnipeg), join us to find out who’ll take the crown this year! Registration is open and spots are limited!
content:
Preamble
Stratton Agri, Rumble in the Valley & StrongManitoba present: WESTERN CANADA’S STRONGEST MASTER 2026!
Held at the Morris Stampede Grounds in Morris, MB (40 mins south of Winnipeg), join us to find out who’ll take the crown this year! Registration is open and spots are limited!

Location
Morris Stampede Grounds, Morris

Events

  Truck Pull (semi truck for women; truck and trailer for men)
  Press Medley (barbell, circus dumbbell, axle, log)
Women: 135, 70, 155, 165
Men: 225, 130, 265, 275
  Hercules Hold - heavy
  Deadlift Off (think “Stone off” from WSM)
Women: 335
Men: 555
  5-Stone Run
Run finishes with a 265 stone for women; a 365 stone for men

title: Novice Showdown
excerpt:
Preamble
It’s time again to bring out the new faces to Manitoba strongman!
content:
Preamble
It’s time again to bring out the new faces to Manitoba strongman!

This year the Novice Showdown will be hosted in Winkler by our friends at @the.forgegym, and will feature one of the coolest events in all of strongman, the TRUCK PULL!

This competition is open to anyone with very little to no experience in strongman (if you’re unsure if this is you, contact us), and is additionally open to our regular 50+ competitors!

Registration will be open by next week, so encourage anyone who may be interested to get signed up!

Location
The Forge Gym, Winkler

Events


  
    Log Clean and Press for Reps
Men: 160 lbs (12” log)
Women: 85 lbs (10” log)
Teen Boys: 85 lbs (10” log)
Teen Girls: 60 lbs (10” log)
  
  
    Wagon Wheel (14”) Axle Deadlift for Reps
Men: 435 lbs
Women: 240 lbs
Teen Boys: 250 lbs
Teen Girls: 175 lbs
  
  
    Farmers Carry (30’ + 30’)
Men: 210 lbs/hand
Women: 125 lbs/hand
Teen Boys: 145 lbs/hand
Teen Girls: 85 lbs/hand
  
  
    Carry and Load Medley (Sandbags and Kegs)
Men: 175 lb SB, 200 lb SB, ~200–225 lb keg
Women: 100 lb SB, 125 lb SB, 150 lb keg
Teen Boys: 125 lb SB, 150 lb keg, 150 lb SB
Teen Girls: 50 lb SB, 100 lb keg, 100 lb SB
  
  
    Truck Pull - Heavy

title: Charity Log Lift
excerpt:
Preamble
StrongManitoba & Iron Age Strength’s annual Charity Log Lift returns, being held at the NEW Iron Age location (49 Heaton Ave)!
content:
Preamble
StrongManitoba & Iron Age Strength’s annual Charity Log Lift returns, being held at the NEW Iron Age location (49 Heaton Ave)!

All (not a percent, not most, ALL) money raised will go to the @northendwomenscentre, so get registered, come watch, and help a great cause!

Registration is LIVE in the @strongmanitoba bio!

Location
Iron Age Strength, Winnipeg

Events

  Log Lift

title: Iron Claw 2
excerpt:
Preamble
We are very excited to announce the first competition in the 2026 season: The return of Manitoba’s only grip sport competition, IRON CLAW!
content:
Preamble
We are very excited to announce the first competition in the 2026 season: The return of Manitoba’s only grip sport competition, IRON CLAW!

This year StrongManitoba & Manitoba Grip Sport will welcome a very special guest referee, none other than Canada’s Strongest Man, “Sweet T” Tristain Hoath!

Tristain is one of the best strongman competitors to ever come out of Canada, taking 5th at World’s Strongest Man, as well as competing at The Strongest Man on Earth, The Rogue Invitational, and Giants Live!

This will be a 4 lift competition (events TBA), open to anyone and everyone looking to test their grip and find out the best! Iron Claw will also be sanctioned by Grip Sport International, so any Canadian or even world records will be official!

Location
Iron Age Strength, Winnipeg

Events

  Double-Overhand Axle Deadlift
  Little Big Horn
  Two-Handed Flask
  Finnish Ball
